master_style: MASTER STYLE: Vibrant, warm children's book illustration in soft digital painting style. Clean outlines with rich saturated colors. Main character Luca is a cheerful 8-year-old Dominican boy with warm brown skin, short curly black hair, wearing a white collared school uniform shirt and navy blue shorts with white sneakers. His friends are: Noah, a tall 8-year-old Dominican boy with deep brown skin, neat short twists, wearing a white school uniform shirt and navy pants; Sophia, a bright-eyed 8-year-old Dominican girl with medium brown skin, long black hair in two puff ponytails, wearing a white blouse and navy blue skirt; Holly, a petite 8-year-old Dominican girl with warm brown skin, straight black hair in a braid, wearing a white blouse and navy skirt with small flower clips; Yeibel, an energetic 8-year-old Dominican girl with rich dark brown skin, curly hair pulled into a high puff, wearing a white blouse and navy skirt with colorful friendship bracelets. Señora Martínez is a kind Dominican woman in her 40s with warm brown skin, dark hair pulled into a bun, wearing a bright floral blouse. Setting is Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic — colorful painted homes in yellow, coral, turquoise, and green with iron balconies, lush tropical plants, mango trees, bougainvillea, and a warm golden Caribbean light. Hope Academy school features cheerful painted classrooms with large windows, tropical courtyard, wooden benches, and vibrant student artwork on the walls. 16:9 landscape format.
page_prompts: A warm, golden early morning inside a colorful Dominican home in Santo Domingo. Luca, a cheerful 8-year-old Dominican boy with warm brown skin and short curly black hair in a white school uniform shirt and navy shorts, stands proudly beside a bright wooden desk in his bedroom, smiling down at a neatly completed math worksheet resting on the desk surface. Behind him, sunlight streams through a window draped with tropical curtains, revealing colorful painted homes and lush green plants outside. A small Dominican girl — his little sister — peeks through the open doorway calling him, her arm waving excitedly. Luca turns toward her with a grin, mid-dash away from the desk, leaving the worksheet behind in a moment of distraction. The bedroom is cozy with tropical decor, a small bookshelf, and crayons scattered nearby. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A bright, cheerful morning at the front gate of Hope Academy, a colorful Caribbean school with painted yellow and turquoise walls and lush tropical plants climbing the fence. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts, white sneakers) walks joyfully with his four friends: Noah (deep brown skin, short neat twists, white shirt, navy pants), Sophia (medium brown skin, long black hair in two puff ponytails, white blouse, navy skirt), Holly (warm brown skin, straight black hair in a braid with flower clips, white blouse, navy skirt), and Yeibel (rich dark brown skin, curly hair in a high puff, white blouse, navy skirt, colorful friendship bracelets). All five children laugh and gesture animatedly about the upcoming soccer game, their backpacks bouncing. Luca's backpack flap is slightly open, with a loose paper barely visible peeking out — not tucked safely into a folder. Warm golden Caribbean morning light bathes the entire scene. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside a bright, cheerful Dominican classroom with large open windows framing tropical plants and blue sky outside, colorful student artwork pinned to the walls, and rows of wooden desks. Señora Martínez, a kind Dominican woman in her 40s with warm brown skin and dark hair in a bun wearing a bright floral blouse, stands at the front of the class smiling warmly at the students. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) sits at his desk with a worried expression, holding open his homework folder and staring down at it — inside are only a blank piece of paper and a broken pencil, no worksheet in sight. His brow is furrowed and his mouth is slightly open in dismay. Noah, Sophia, Holly, and Yeibel sit at nearby desks, each placing their homework neatly on their desks with calm, ready expressions. The contrast between Luca's panic and his friends' calm is clear and emotionally vivid. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Close scene inside the colorful Hope Academy classroom with warm sunlight filtering through tropical-plant-framed windows. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) sits at his desk leaning forward urgently, his backpack fully open and tipped sideways on the floor beside him as he digs through it with both hands — books, a lunchbox, and a pencil case are scattered around him. His expression is one of mounting anxiety, eyebrows raised, eyes wide and searching. A small thought-bubble or visual flashback hint shows a loose worksheet fluttering free in the top corner of the illustration, capturing the memory of it never being placed in the folder. Noah glances over from the next desk with a concerned and curious look. The classroom background shows other students calmly working. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside the warm, sunlit Hope Academy classroom, Sophia (medium brown skin, long black hair in two puff ponytails, white blouse, navy skirt) leans across the aisle from her desk toward Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) with a kind and gentle expression, whispering to him with one hand cupped near her mouth. Luca looks back at her with a slow, worried headshake, his shoulders drooping and hands resting helplessly on his empty folder. Sophia's eyes are soft and encouraging, her free hand pointing subtly toward the classroom as if suggesting he check again. The sinking feeling on Luca's face — downcast eyes, slightly trembling lip — contrasts with Sophia's warm, hopeful expression. Other students, including Noah, Holly, and Yeibel, are visible in the background attending to their own work. Colorful tropical classroom decor and open windows with swaying palm fronds frame the scene. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside the bright Dominican classroom, Señora Martínez (warm brown skin, dark hair in a bun, bright floral blouse) stands beside Luca's desk, holding a small stack of collected homework papers, her eyebrow raised gently and arms folded in a calm but skeptical pose. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) looks up at her from his seat with wide, nervous eyes and an earnest, pleading expression, his empty folder open on the desk in front of him. The mood is tense but not unkind — Señora Martínez's expression is firm yet measured, not angry. Several classmates nearby — including Sophia and Noah — glance over with worried or sympathetic looks. Warm afternoon classroom light, tropical plants on the windowsill, and student artwork on the walls create a safe but serious atmosphere. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A close, emotionally rich scene inside the colorful Dominican classroom. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) sits at his desk with flushed, embarrassed cheeks and a deeply earnest expression, hands gesturing as he explains himself — fingers spread, eyes sincere and slightly glassy. Señora Martínez stands nearby listening, her expression patient but reserved, arms still gently folded. A few surrounding students — including Holly with her braided hair and Yeibel with her high puff — look over from their desks with empathetic or curious glances. The classroom feels warm and bright but emotionally charged for Luca. A subtle visual cue — a small illustrated backpack in the corner with a loose paper barely sticking out — echoes the source of the problem. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside the warm, sunlit Hope Academy classroom, Señora Martínez (warm brown skin, dark hair in a bun, bright floral blouse) stands beside Luca's desk speaking gently but seriously, one hand raised slightly in an explanatory gesture. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) listens with a solemn, downcast expression, hands folded in his lap, processing her words. The word 'RESPONSIBILITY' is illustrated in a warm, bold stylized font floating softly in the air between them like a gentle visual emphasis — not harsh, but meaningful. Luca's face shows genuine reflection and a touch of regret, not shame. Sunlight streams through the classroom windows, casting a warm golden glow, and tropical plants sway softly in the breeze outside. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A breezy, sun-drenched school courtyard at Hope Academy in Santo Domingo, surrounded by tall mango trees with lush green leaves casting dappled shade. Noah (deep brown skin, short neat twists, white school shirt, navy pants) stands close beside Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts), one hand on Luca's shoulder in a supportive gesture, speaking to him with a focused and determined expression. Luca listens with a hopeful, slightly worried face. The two boys stand near the classroom doorway, about to begin retracing their morning steps — the hallway entrance visible behind them. Other children play in the background during recess. A warm Caribbean breeze ruffles the mango tree leaves above them, and tropical flowers in pots line the courtyard edges. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A wide, sunny view of the Hope Academy courtyard on a warm Caribbean afternoon, full of tropical color — wooden benches, a small soccer field, and a student-planted flower garden with bright blooms. Holly (warm brown skin, straight black hair in a braid with flower clips, white blouse, navy skirt) crouches near a wooden bench, peering underneath it carefully. Yeibel (rich dark brown skin, curly hair in a high puff, white blouse, navy skirt, colorful friendship bracelets) stands near the fence with wide eyes, one arm raised excitedly, pointing toward a bush where a small white paper flutters in the breeze — barely caught on the branches. The white paper is clearly visible flapping gently, a beacon of hope in the warm golden light. Luca and Noah are visible in the background mid-run, retracing their path. The mood is exciting and triumphant — a breakthrough moment. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

An exciting, joyful moment in the sun-drenched Hope Academy courtyard. Yeibel (rich dark brown skin, curly hair in a high puff, white blouse, navy skirt, colorful friendship bracelets) stands beside a flowering bush near the school fence, arms waving enthusiastically with a huge grin. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) has just reached the bush and bends forward to carefully pick up a crinkled white worksheet caught on the branches, his face lighting up with pure relief and joy. The worksheet is clearly visible with neat handwriting and math problems on it. Noah, Sophia, and Holly run toward them in the background with excited, celebratory expressions. The warm Caribbean sunlight glows golden over the tropical courtyard, and colorful bougainvillea blooms frame the fence behind them. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A warm, glowing moment of gratitude in the sunny Hope Academy courtyard. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) stands in the center, holding the recovered worksheet carefully with both hands and looking around at his four friends with shining, grateful eyes and a wide, sincere smile. Noah, Sophia, Holly, and Yeibel stand around him in a loose circle — all beaming, some laughing, some with hands clasped in celebration. The word 'EMPATHY' appears in soft, warm illustrated lettering near the top of the scene, glowing gently like a halo over the group. The tropical courtyard glows with warm afternoon light, mango trees sway overhead, and colorful flower beds bloom behind the friends. The mood is heartwarming, joyful, and deeply connected. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside the warm, colorful Hope Academy classroom after recess. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) stands respectfully at Señora Martínez's large wooden desk, carefully placing a slightly crinkled worksheet on the surface with both hands, his expression honest and earnest. Señora Martínez (warm brown skin, dark hair in a bun, bright floral blouse) sits behind the desk, leaning forward to look at the paper with a surprised and softening expression, her folded arms beginning to relax. Behind Luca, his four friends — Noah, Sophia, Holly, and Yeibel — stand in a supportive cluster just inside the classroom doorway, watching with hopeful, encouraging smiles. The classroom is warm with golden afternoon light, student artwork on the walls, and tropical plants on the windowsills. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A tender, affirming moment inside the Hope Academy classroom bathed in warm golden afternoon light. Señora Martínez (warm brown skin, dark hair in a bun, bright floral blouse) sits at her desk holding up the recovered worksheet and looking at Luca with a genuinely warm, proud, and understanding smile. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) stands before her, visibly relieved — shoulders relaxed, a small grateful smile spreading across his face as he listens attentively. Señora Martínez gestures kindly with one hand as she speaks, her expression both affirming and gently instructive. The worksheet is visible in her other hand, filled with neat handwriting. Noah, Sophia, Holly, and Yeibel watch from nearby desks with happy, supportive expressions. Colorful tropical classroom decor and open windows with swaying palms complete the scene. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A quiet, determined scene inside Luca's cozy, colorful Dominican bedroom in Santo Domingo, lit by warm late-afternoon light. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) sits at his bright wooden desk, carefully sliding a completed paper directly into a clearly labeled homework folder with a focused, committed expression — eyebrows set with resolve, a small proud smile forming. On the corner of the desk, he sticks a handwritten sticky note that reads 'PUT IN FOLDER!' in cheerful bold letters. The room is warm and inviting with tropical curtains, a small bookshelf, and colorful Dominican decor. Through the window behind him, the golden late-afternoon sky over Santo Domingo's colorful rooftops glows warmly. The mood is purposeful, hopeful, and triumphant. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A joyful, golden late-afternoon scene on a colorful street in Santo Domingo, lined with bright painted homes in coral, turquoise, yellow, and green, with bougainvillea climbing iron balconies and lush tropical plants lining the path. Luca (warm brown skin, short curly black hair, white uniform shirt, navy shorts) walks with his four friends — Noah, Sophia, Holly, and Yeibel — all laughing and gesturing animatedly, backpacks on their shoulders, bathed in warm golden Caribbean sunset light. They hold up a hand-drawn sign between them that reads 'HOMEWORK HEROES' with small stars and hearts drawn around the letters. All five faces glow with happiness, friendship, and pride. The mood is triumphant, warm, and celebratory — a perfect storybook ending full of joy, empathy, and responsibility. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.
